template:
test -f benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-adna-bam-mini/aligned/adna_y_haplogroup_panel.sam.bai && test -f benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-adna-bam-mini/reference/adna_y_haplogroup_panel.tsv && yleaf -bam benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-adna-bam-mini/aligned/adna_y_haplogroup_panel.sam -o benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.haplogroups/haplogroups --reference_genome hg38 && python - <<'PY' > benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.haplogroups/haplogroups.summary.json
import json
print(json.dumps(json.loads({"method":"yleaf","min_coverage":2.0,"population_scope":"adna_y_haplogroup_panel","reference_build":"hg38","reference_panel":"benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-adna-bam-mini/reference/adna_y_haplogroup_panel.tsv","refuse_without_population_context":true}), indent=2))
PY && python - <<'PY' > benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.haplogroups/haplogroups.json
import json
print(json.dumps(json.loads({"assignment_output_prefix":"benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.haplogroups/haplogroups","classification_scope":"y_haplogroup_inference","coverage_gate":{"min_coverage":2.0},"population_scope":"adna_y_haplogroup_panel","reference_build":"hg38","reference_panel":"benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-adna-bam-mini/reference/adna_y_haplogroup_panel.tsv","refuse_without_population_context":true,"schema_version":"bijux.bam.haplogroups.v1","summary_output":"benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.haplogroups/haplogroups.summary.json","tool":"yleaf"}), indent=2))
PY
